assumption: OSM motorway: strategic controlled-access or highest mobility road; outside DUCAR unless delegated.
OSM trunk: major interregional road; treated as national network for screening.
OSM primary: major national/regional road; treated as national unless local inventory confirms DUCAR responsibility.
OSM secondary: likely inter-district connector; DUCAR district candidate where not in UNRA network.
OSM unclassified: lower-order public road, mapped as community access candidate pending field confirmation.
OSM living street: urban local access road.
OSM service: local access/service road; requires ownership screening.
OSM track: rural/agricultural access candidate; requires maintainability confirmation.
OSM highway=road is an unknown temporary class; field/manual classification required.
